name: performance-analysis
description: Front-end performance analysis tooling powered by Sitespeed.io.

scripts.perf:4g: bash -c 'set -e; trap "npm run -s simulate:stop" EXIT; npm run -s simulate:4g; npm run -s docker:run'
scripts.perf:3g: bash -c 'set -e; trap "npm run -s simulate:stop" EXIT; npm run -s simulate:3g; npm run -s docker:run'
